name: Baked Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown chops with melted butter in a large skillet.
2. Place the chops in a greased baking dish.
3. Put a thin slice of lemon on each chop.
4. Sprinkle salt and pepper over the chops.
5. Spread brown sugar evenly over the chops, then add tomato sauce.
6. Cover the dish and bake for 1-1/4 hours at 350°F.
Walt
